description: In a casual slip-on style with absolute visual appeal, this pair from skechers makes for a perfect addition to the casual wardrobe. The smooth leather upper, overlays and stitch detailing gives it a rugged look, making it a fab buy.UpperSmooth oiled leather upper with scuff resistant leather and waxed canvas overlaysSlip-on style for ease of wearAdjustable velcro strap on the midfoot to offer a customised FitRelaxed Step footbed for all-day ergonomically padded comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with strategically placed lugs throughout for absolute grip and tractionTextured grooves on the fore-foot and heel and branding on the midfoot for enhanced gripshoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner if neededDo not store in direct sunlight
